projectDescription: A high-performance git hook manager and project linting tool that runs linters in parallel with file-level read/write locks to maximize concurrency and prevent race conditions.
keyFeatures: Parallel linter execution with file-level read/write locks preventing race conditions
90+ pre-configured built-in linters and formatters via Pkl configuration
Smart stashing with three-way merge to protect unstaged changes during hooks
Type-safe Pkl configuration language with schema validation and IDE support
Deep mise-en-place integration for tool management and task running
Built-in Rust-native utilities (trailing whitespace, end-of-file, merge conflict detection)
check_diff and check_list_files optimization modes to minimize write locks
Configurable profiles for running subsets of linters (e.g., slow, fast, CI)
publicApiSurface: Config.pkl Step: check, fix, glob, batch, check_first, check_diff, check_list_files, depends, exclusive, profiles, env
Config.pkl Hook: fix, stash, steps, report
